data.content: Implemented multi-add continuation for scanned agent imports in Settings. After a scanned model is added, the row now advances to the next unregistered option so the same scan session can keep importing more models without rescanning. Added unit coverage for next-option selection and extended the Copilot settings UI smoke test to verify two models persist from one scan; updated the fake Copilot fixture to expose multiple models via help config. Validation passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build, bash scripts/test-copilot-settings-ui.sh.
